items.name: SmartApp AI Dashboard UI Kit
items.reuse_policy: Code may be used, copied, modified, merged, published, distributed, sublicensed, and sold under MIT; retain the copyright and license notice in copies or substantial portions.
items.access_status: Free public GitHub repository; source, documentation, and license are accessible without login or payment.
skill_usage_notes: Use the responsive dashboard shell, navigation patterns, motion conventions, route structure, and Zustand state organization as a reusable starting point for AI-first and operations applications.
Preserve the TypeScript-only source rule when adapting components so generated projects remain consistent and type-safe.
Reuse the included Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress setup when generating production dashboard components and user-flow tests.
Replace inspiration-specific branding, copy, mock data, and visual assets before reuse.
Retain the MIT copyright and license notice when copying substantial code or templates.
notable_components: Jest and React Testing Library setup

verification.meaningful_update: Stable v1.0.0 AI-first React and TypeScript dashboard baseline with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, responsive behavior, Zustand state, Jest coverage, and Cypress end-to-end testing.
